proposalRequirements: No on-chain proposal mechanism. All admin actions are Binance corporate decisions, signed by Binance-held EOAs that hold owner, pauser, blacklister, masterMinter, operator, rescuer, and proxy-admin roles on the wBETH/Unwrap/ExchangeRateUpdater/OperatorWallet contracts.
votingProcess: No on-chain voting. Binance executes via single-key EOAs holding owner, pauser, masterMinter, operator, and proxy admin roles.
